courses.title: Introduction to Arabic Alphabet
courses.description: Master the pronunciation, writing, and recognition of the 28 letters of the Arabic alphabet with their varying forms (beginning, middle, and end). Ideal for absolute beginners.
objectives: Pronounce each of the 28 Arabic letters correctly from their articulation points (Makharij).
Recognize and write letters in isolated, initial, medial, and final forms.
Understand the short vowels (Fathah, Kasrah, Dammah) and long vowels (Mad letters).

videos.title: Lesson 1: Introduction & Makhraj of Alif to Kha
videos.description: Learn the proper articulation points for the first five letters of the Arabic alphabet.

videos.title: Lesson 2: Letters Dal to Sâd & Connecting Forms
videos.description: Understand how letters change shape when joined together in a word.

videos.title: Lesson 3: Vowels (Fathah, Kasrah, Dammah) and Tanween
videos.description: Master the short vowel markings and double vowels (nunation).

pdfs.title: Arabic Writing & Alphabet Workbook
pdfs.description: Printable tracing exercises for mastering stroke order.

pdfs.title: Makharij Visual Articulation Chart
pdfs.description: An anatomical chart illustrating correct throat and mouth positions.

assignments.title: Alphabet Writing Assignment
assignments.description: Write down the Arabic letters in their individual, starting, middle, and ending forms on a blank sheet. Take a photo of your work and submit it.

questions.questionText: Which letter is pronounced from the deepest part of the throat?
How many letters are there in the Arabic alphabet?
What sound does the Kasrah symbol represent?

courses.title: Basic Tajweed Rules
courses.description: Learn the fundamental guidelines of reciting the Holy Quran with correct pronunciation, focusing on the rules of Noon Sakinah, Tanween, and Meem Sakinah.
objectives: Identify and implement the four rules of Noon Sakinah and Tanween: Izhar, Idgham, Iqlab, and Ikhfa.
Recite surahs from Juz Amma applying these basic rules.
Differentiate between heavy (Tafkheem) and light (Tarqeeq) letters.

videos.title: Lesson 1: Intro to Tajweed & Izhar Halqi
videos.description: Understanding the importance of Tajweed and the clear pronunciation of Noon Sakinah.

videos.title: Lesson 2: Idgham (With and Without Ghunnah)
videos.description: How to merge letters when reciting, with nasalization examples.

pdfs.title: Tajweed Golden Summary Guide
pdfs.description: One-page cheat sheet showing all Noon Sakinah letters.

assignments.title: Record Surah Al-Ikhlas recitation
assignments.description: Record an audio file of yourself reciting Surah Al-Ikhlas while applying Izhar Halqi or other rules. Upload or write your self-evaluation.

questions.questionText: How many rules are there for Noon Sakinah and Tanween?
Which of these is the rule for converting a Noon sound into a Meem?

courses.title: Introduction to Al-Nahw (Arabic Grammar)
courses.description: Delve into the system of Arabic sentence structure, word classifications (Ism, Fi'l, Harf), and the grammatical states (Raf', Nasb, Jarr) of words.
objectives: Classify any Arabic word into Noun (Ism), Verb (Fi'l), or Particle (Harf).
Determine the grammatical state of singular nouns in nominal and verbal sentences.

videos.title: Lesson 1: The Three Word Classifications
videos.description: Deep dive into signs of an Ism, Fi'l, and Harf.

assignments.title: Grammatical Breakdown of Surah Fatiha Verse 1-3
assignments.description: Identify the nouns, verbs, and particles in the first three verses of Surah Al-Fatiha and submit your analysis.

questions.questionText: Which of the following is a key sign of an Ism (Noun)?
What is the standard grammatical state of a Subject (Fâ'il) in a sentence?

courses.title: Al-Ajurrumiyyah Deep Study
courses.description: An intensive advanced course studying the classical text in Arabic grammar, 'Matn al-Ajurrumiyyah', exploring complete parsing (I'rab) and complex sentence structures.
objectives: Memorize and explain key passages of Matn Al-Ajurrumiyyah.
Perform advanced syntactical analysis (I'rab) on classical texts and complex Quranic verses.
Understand the subtle differences in Arabic syntax that affect theological meanings.

videos.title: Lesson 1: Introduction to Matn & Author's Biography
videos.description: Contextual history of Ibn Ajurrum and the structure of his famous text.

pdfs.title: Matn Al-Ajurrumiyyah Arabic-English Interlinear
pdfs.description: The original text paired with word-by-word explanation.

assignments.title: Advanced Syntactical Research Paper
assignments.description: Analyze the complete grammatical structures and rhetorical implications of Ayat Al-Kursi (2:255). Word count: 1000+ words in Arabic/English.

questions.questionText: How many types of Mansoobaat (nouns in accusative state) are outlined in Al-Ajurrumiyyah?
What is the marker of Raf' in the sound masculine plural (Jam' Mudhakkar Salim)?

courses.title: The Prophetic Prayer Guide (Salah)
courses.description: A free, step-by-step practical visual guide to performing the daily Islamic prayers exactly as demonstrated by Prophet Muhammad (peace be upon him).
objectives: Learn the prerequisites of prayer (Wudu/ablution, intention, and direction).
Perform every movement of Salah correctly (Takbeer, Ruku, Sajdah, Tashahhud).
Memorize the essential supplications recited in each posture.

videos.title: Complete Step-by-Step Salah Guide
videos.description: A highly visual demonstration of the entire prayer from start to finish.

pdfs.title: Prophetic Prayer Pocket Guide
pdfs.description: A beautifully illustrated pocket booklet to memorize prayers.

donations.message: May Allah accept this to sponsor a young seeker of Islamic knowledge.
In support of Madrasah education operations.
For building the virtual servers and expanding courses globally.

books.title: Al-Aqeedah Al-Wasitiyyah
books.author: Shaykh al-Islam Ibn Taymiyyah
books.description: A concise yet comprehensive treatise outlining the creed of Ahlus-Sunnah wal-Jama'ah with strict adherence to Quranic texts and Prophetic narrations.

books.title: Riyadh As-Saliheen (The Meadows of the Righteous)
books.author: Imam An-Nawawi
books.description: A celebrated collection of Quranic verses and authentic Hadiths compiled to guide Muslims in spiritual purification, moral conduct, and daily life.

books.title: Tafsir Al-Jalalayn
books.author: Jalaluddin Al-Mahalli & Jalaluddin As-Suyuti
books.description: A famous classical Quranic commentary renowned for its brevity, clarity, and direct explanation of words.

books.title: Al-Mukhtasar in Hanafi Fiqh
books.author: Imam Al-Quduri
books.description: The premier handbook of Islamic jurisprudence according to the Hanafi school of thought, covering worship, transactions, and family law.

books.title: Ar-Raheeq Al-Makhtum (The Sealed Nectar)
books.author: Shaykh Safiur-Rahman Al-Mubarakpuri
books.description: An award-winning biography of Prophet Muhammad (peace be upon him) tracing his noble life, character, and mission.

poems.title: Al-Qasida Al-Lamiyyah (The L-Poem)
poems.biography: A prominent Syrian scholar, jurist, and poet known for his expertise in grammar and Shafi'i jurisprudence. This masterpiece of ethical exhortation was written for his son.
arabicText: اعْتَزِلْ ذِكْرَ الأَغَانِي وَالْغَزَلْ ... وَدَعِ الْهَزْلَ وَجَانِبْ مَنْ هَزَلْ
وَافْتَكِرْ فِي مُنْتَهَى حُسْنِ الَّذِي ... أَنْتَ تَهْوَاهُ تَجِدْ خَطْبًا جَلَلْ
وَاتَّقِ اللهَ فَتَقْوَى اللهِ مَا ... جَاوَرَتْ قَلْبَ امْرِئٍ إِلاَّ وَصَلْ
كُتِبَ الْمَوْتُ عَلَى الْخَلْقِ فَكَمْ ... فَلَّ جَيْشًا بَغْتَةً وَهْوَ بَطَلْ
translationText: Abandon the mention of songs and romantic verses... and leave playfulness, and keep clear of those who joke.
And reflect upon the ultimate end of the beauty of that... which you love, you will find it a substantial affair.
And fear Allah, for the fear of Allah has never... resided in the heart of a person except that they reached their goal.
Death has been decreed upon creation; how many... an army has it defeated suddenly, even if they were heroes!

poems.title: Qasidat Unwan al-Hikam (The Address of Wisdom)
poems.biography: A legendary Persian secretary, literary critic, and poet celebrated for his rhetorical styling, wise aphorisms, and grammatical mastery.
arabicText: أَحْسِنْ إِلَى النَّاسِ تَسْتَعْبِدْ قُلُوبَهُمُ ... فَطَالَمَا اسْتَعْبَدَ الإِنْسَانَ إِحْسَانُ
يَا خَادِمَ الْجِسْمِ كَمْ تَسْعَى لِخِدْمَتِهِ ... أَتَطْلُبُ الرِّبْحَ مِمَّا فِيهِ خُسْرَانُ
أَقْبِلْ عَلَى النَّفْسِ وَاسْتَكْمِلْ فَضَائِلَهَا ... فَأَنْتَ بِالنَّفْسِ لا بِالْجِسْمِ إِنْسَانُ
translationText: Be good to people, and you will enslave their hearts... for how long has goodness enslaved a human being!
O servant of the body, how much do you strive in its service... do you seek profit from that which holds loss?
Turn towards the soul and complete its virtues... for you are a human by virtue of your soul, not your physical body.

announcements.title: New Academic Term Registration Open
announcements.content: We are pleased to announce that registrations are now open for the upcoming semester. Students can enroll into Beginner level, Intermediate, or Advanced level tracks.
announcements.author: Administration

testimonials.name: Ibrahim Cole
testimonials.content: Learning Arabic was always a hurdle for me. Abu Qoonitah Academy's structured methodology and direct focus on classical Matns like Al-Ajurrumiyyah broke it down beautifully.

testimonials.name: Aishah bint Haroon
testimonials.content: My two children attend the online daily Quran classes. The level of patience and Tajweed precision the teachers demonstrate is unmatched. I can track their attendance and quiz scores daily.

testimonials.name: Dr. Tariq Mahmood
testimonials.content: This LMS provides the true spiritual essence of a traditional digital Madrasah with the rigorous learning metrics of a world-class university.

quoteOfTheDay.arabic: مَنْ سَلَكَ طَرِيقًا يَلْتَمِسُ فِيهِ عِلْمًا سَهَّلَ اللَّهُ لَهُ بِهِ طَرِيقًا إِلَى الْجَنَّةِ
quoteOfTheDay.translation: Whoever takes a path upon which he seeks knowledge, Allah will make easy for him a path to Paradise.

freeCourse.title: Laamiyyatu Ibn Taimiyyah
freeCourse.description: The classical creed poem (Aqeedah) composed by Sheikh-ul-Islam Ibn Taimiyyah, presenting authentic Islamic beliefs regarding the Companions, the Divine Attributes, and the Quran in elegant rhyme.
poemArabicText: يَا سَائِلِي عَنْ مَذْهَبِي وَعَقِيدَتِي ... رُزِقَ الْهُدَى مَنْ لِلْهِدَايَةِ يَسْأَلُ
اسْمَعْ كَلَامَ مُحَقِّقٍ فِي قَوْلِهِ ... لَا يَنْثَنِي عَنْهُ وَلَا يَتَبَدَّلُ
حُبُّ الصَّحَابَةِ كُلِّهِمْ لِي مَذْهَبٌ ... وَمَوَدَّةٌ أَرْجُو بِهَا أَتَوَسَّلُ
poemTranslationText: O seeker inquiring about my creed and school of thought... Guided is the one who asks for guidance!
Hear the words of a verifier in his speech... One who never wavers nor changes his stance.
Loving all of the Companions is my path... And a devotion through which I seek a means of near-ness (to Allah).

audioFiles.title: Complete Recitation (Acoustic)
audioFiles.description: Beautiful classical melodic recitation of the complete 16 verses of Laamiyyatu Ibn Taimiyyah.

aboutUs.historyEn: Abu Qoonitah Islamic Academy started as a focused public initiative to teach basic Tajweed and Arabic to non-native speakers. It rapidly blossomed into a comprehensive digital Madrasah serving thousands of students across the globe with structured modules, daily assignments, and direct teacher oversight.
aboutUs.historyAr: انطلقت أكاديمية أبو قانتة الإسلامية كمبادرة لتعليم مبادئ التجويد واللغة العربية للناطقين بغيرها، ثم سرعان ما تطورت لتصبح صرحًا تعليميًا إسلاميًا متكاملاً يخدم آلاف الطلاب من مختلف دول العالم عبر الفصول الافتراضية الممنهجة واللقاءات الحية المتكررة.
aboutUs.founderBioEn: Ustadh Abu Qoonitah is a seasoned instructor specializing in classical Arabic grammar (Nahw/Sarf) and Quran recitation. He has spent years breaking down dense texts like 'Al-Ajurrumiyyah' and establishing phonetic clarity for students around the world, aiming to re-connect Muslims directly with the language of Revelation.
aboutUs.founderBioAr: الأستاذ أبو قانتة متخصص في تدريس النحو والصرف، ومجاز برواية حفص عن عاصم، كرس سنوات عديدة في تبسيط متون النحو كـ'الآجرومية' وتيسير مخارج الحروف للطلاب غير الناطقين بلسان عربي مبين، هادفًا لربط الأمة بلغة وحي رب العالمين.

values.descEn: All learning and service are dedicated purely for the cause of Allah.
values.descAr: أن يكون العمل خالصًا لوجه الله الكريم ونفع المسلمين.

values.descEn: Knowledge grounded in Quran and Sunnah, following the righteous predecessors.
values.descAr: تأصيل المعارف الشرعية بالاعتماد على الكتاب والسنة الصحيحة.

values.descEn: Utilizing modern educational pedagogy to deliver high comprehension rates.
values.descAr: اتباع أفضل المناهج والوسائل الحديثة لتسهيل الفهم والحفظ.

values.descEn: Nurturing students in high ethical conduct alongside academic proficiency.
values.descAr: تربية النفوس على مكارم الأخلاق والسمت الإسلامي القويم.

faqs.qEn: Who is the founder of Abu Qoonitah Islamic Academy?
faqs.qAr: من هو مؤسس أكاديمية أبو قانتة الإسلامية؟
faqs.aEn: The academy was founded by Ustadh Abu Qoonitah, an authorized (Mujeez) classical Arabic and Islamic studies instructor with extensive experience teaching Tajweed and Arabic grammar to students globally.
faqs.aAr: تأسست الأكاديمية بإشراف الأستاذ أبو قانتة، وهو معلم مجاز ومتخصص في تدريس العلوم العربية والقرآنية وله خبرة طويلة في تأهيل طلبة العلم حول العالم.

faqs.qEn: What are the age groups for the classes?
faqs.qAr: ما هي الفئات العمرية المستهدفة في الحلقات؟
faqs.aEn: We offer tailored classes for children (6-12), teenagers (13-18), and adult tracks for university students and general seekers.
faqs.aAr: لدينا برامج مخصصة للأطفال (من سن ٦ إلى ١٢ سنة)، وللناشئين والشباب، بالإضافة إلى مسارات مخصصة للكبار وطلبة الجامعات.

faqs.qEn: How do paid and free courses differ?
faqs.qAr: ما الفرق بين الدورات المجانية والدورات المدفوعة؟
faqs.aEn: Free courses contain pre-recorded video lessons and study handouts. Paid levels provide live-streamed tutoring, grading systems, interactive quizzes, direct assignments, and authorized graduation certificates.
faqs.aAr: الدروس المجانية مفتوحة للجميع وتحتوي على تسجيلات ومذكرات مبسطة. أما المسارات المدفوعة فتشتمل على حلقات تفاعلية، ومتابعة يومية، واختبارات، وشهادات تخرج معتمدة.

faqs.qEn: Can I learn at my own pace?
faqs.qAr: هل يمكنني الدراسة بحسب وتيرتي الخاصة؟
faqs.aEn: Yes, our digital Madrasah platform tracks your progress. You can watch recorded lecture videos and submit your assignments whenever you are ready.
faqs.aAr: نعم، نظام المدرسة الرقمية يسجل تقدمك تلقائياً؛ وبذلك تستطيع مشاهدة الحلقات المسجلة وتسليم الواجبات في أي وقت يناسبك.

curriculum.whyEnroll: Abu Qoonitah Islamic Academy provides a structured online Madrasah environment that blends the depth of classical, traditional texts with the speed and reach of modern LMS technology. Gain a firm foundation in Tajweed, Arabic grammar, and authentic Islamic creed under certified teachers with direct supervision.

donationSettings.targetTitle: Expand Islamic Digital Infrastructure & Sponsor Seeking Students
donationSettings.targetDescription: Support Abu Qoonitah Islamic Academy in acquiring server storage, broadcasting licenses, and direct sponsorships for needy students of classical knowledge.

poetry.title: Al-Qasidah al-Laamiyyah in Creed
poetry.author: Shaykh al-Islam Ibn Taymiyyah
poetry.description: Concise and beautiful verses detailing the pristine creed of Ahlus-Sunnah wal-Jama'ah regarding the Sahabah, the Qur'an, and divine attributes.
poetry.text:
يَا سَائِلِي عَنْ مَذْهَبِي وَعَقِيدَتِي *** رُزِقَ الْهُدَى مَنْ لِلْهِدَايَةِ يَسْأَلُ
اسْمَعْ كَلَامَ مُحَقِّقٍ فِي قَوْلِهِ *** لَا يَنْثَنِي عَنْهُ وَلَا يَتَبَدَّلُ
حُبُّ الصَّحَابَةِ كُلِّهِمْ لِي مَذْهَبٌ *** وَمَوَدَّةُ الْقُرْبَى بِهَا أَتَوَسَّلُ
وَلِكُلِّهِمْ قَدْرٌ وَفَضْلٌ سَاطِعٌ *** لَكِنَّمَا الصِّدِّيقُ مِنْهُمْ أَفْضَلُ

poetry.title: Lamiyyah of Ibn al-Wardi
poetry.author: Imam Zain-Al-Din Ibn Al-Wardi
poetry.description: A famous masterpiece of moral exhortations, wisdom, and strict self-discipline for every earnest seeker of knowledge.
poetry.text:
اعْتَزِلْ ذِكْرَ الأَغَانِي وَالغَزَلْ *** وَدَعِ الهَذْرَ وَجَانِبْ مَنْ هَزَلْ
وَادَّقِرْ شَبَابَكَ إِذْ بَانَ فَقَدْ *** رُعِيَ السَّرْحُ وَعَيْنُ المَاءِ جَلْ
وَاطْلُبِ العِلْمَ وَلاَ تَكْسَلْ فَمَا *** أَبْعَدَ الخَيْرَ عَلَى أَهْلِ الكَسَلْ
وَاحْتَفِلْ لِلْفِقْهِ فِي الدِّينِ وَلاَ *** تَشْتَغِلْ عَنْهُ بِمَالٍ وَخَوَلْ
